# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

repository:
  name: automated_backups_repo
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: operations-team-elasticsearch-snapshots
    region: us-east-1
    base_path: elasticsearch/automated-backups
    compress: true
    server_side_encryption: true

snapshot_policy:
  name: automated_daily_snapshots
  schedule: "0 30 2 * * ?"
  repository: automated_backups_repo
  indices:
    - "*"
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: true
  partial: false
  retention:
    expire_after: 30d
    min_count: 7
    max_count: 90

snapshot_creation:
  enabled: true
  method: api
  endpoint: "/_snapshot/automated_backups_repo/snapshot-{now/d}"
  wait_for_completion: false
  body:
    indices:
      - "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false

snapshot_restoration:
  enabled: true
  method: api
  endpoint: "/_snapshot/automated_backups_repo/{snapshot_name}/_restore"
  wait_for_completion: true
  body:
    indices:
      - "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    rename_pattern: "(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored_$1"

operations_team_file_share_option:
  enabled: false
  repository:
    name: automated_backups_file_repo
    type: fs
    settings:
      location: /mnt/elasticsearch-snapshots
      compress: true
  snapshot_policy:
    repository: automated_backups_file_repo
